_comment: M&M 3e advantages — from the d20 Hero SRD (OGL)

accurate_attack.name: Accurate Attack
accurate_attack.note: Trade up to -5 effect DC for +5 attack bonus on a single attack

all_out_attack.name: All-out Attack
all_out_attack.note: Trade up to -5 active defenses for +5 attack bonus on a single attack

close_attack.name: Close Attack
close_attack.note: +1 close attack check bonus per rank

defensive_attack.name: Defensive Attack
defensive_attack.note: Trade up to -5 attack bonus for +5 active defenses

defensive_roll.name: Defensive Roll
defensive_roll.note: +1 Toughness per rank (active defense, lost when vulnerable/defenseless)

evasion.name: Evasion
evasion.note: Rank 1: +2 Dodge vs area effects. Rank 2: +5 Dodge vs area effects

fast_grab.name: Fast Grab
fast_grab.note: Free grab check after successful unarmed attack

favored_environment.name: Favored Environment
favored_environment.note: +2 circumstance bonus to attack or defense in chosen environment

grabbing_finesse.name: Grabbing Finesse
grabbing_finesse.note: Use Dexterity for grab attacks; not vulnerable while grabbing

improved_aim.name: Improved Aim
improved_aim.note: Double normal aim bonuses (+10 close/adjacent, +5 ranged)

improved_critical.name: Improved Critical
improved_critical.note: +1 critical threat range per rank (max 16-20 at rank 4)

improved_defense.name: Improved Defense
improved_defense.note: +2 circumstance bonus to active defenses when taking defend action

improved_disarm.name: Improved Disarm
improved_disarm.note: No penalty for disarm; opponent cannot disarm you

improved_grab.name: Improved Grab
improved_grab.note: Grab with one arm; not vulnerable while grabbing

improved_hold.name: Improved Hold
improved_hold.note: -5 penalty to escape from your holds

improved_trip.name: Improved Trip
improved_trip.note: No trip penalty; opponent cannot trip you; you choose defending skill

improvised_weapon.name: Improvised Weapon
improvised_weapon.note: Use Close Combat skill with improvised weapons; +1 damage per rank

move_by_action.name: Move-by Action
move_by_action.note: Move before and after standard action within total speed

power_attack.name: Power Attack
power_attack.note: Trade up to -5 attack bonus for +5 effect bonus on a single attack

precise_attack.name: Precise Attack
precise_attack.note: Ignore cover or concealment penalty (close/ranged x cover/concealment)

prone_fighting.name: Prone Fighting
prone_fighting.note: No penalties while prone; adjacent opponents lose circumstance bonus

ranged_attack.name: Ranged Attack
ranged_attack.note: +1 ranged attack check bonus per rank

redirect.name: Redirect
redirect.note: Use Deception to redirect a missed attack at a new target

set_up.name: Set-up
set_up.note: Transfer interaction skill benefit to one ally per rank

takedown.name: Takedown
takedown.note: Free extra attack vs minion when incapacitating one; rank 2: non-adjacent

uncanny_dodge.name: Uncanny Dodge
uncanny_dodge.note: Not vulnerable when surprised or caught off-guard

weapon_bind.name: Weapon Bind
weapon_bind.note: Free disarm attempt as reaction when defending vs weapon attack

weapon_break.name: Weapon Break
weapon_break.note: Free attack vs weapon as reaction when defending

beginners_luck.name: Beginner's Luck
beginners_luck.note: Spend VP: gain 5 effective ranks in a skill you have 4 or fewer ranks in for the scene

inspire.name: Inspire
inspire.note: Spend VP: allies gain +1 circumstance bonus per rank (max +5) until next round

leadership.name: Leadership
leadership.note: Spend VP: remove dazed, fatigued, or stunned from one ally

luck.name: Luck
luck.note: Reroll one die per rank per session; rolls of 10 or less become 11+

seize_initiative.name: Seize Initiative
seize_initiative.note: Spend VP: go first in initiative order at start of combat

ultimate_effort.name: Ultimate Effort
ultimate_effort.note: Spend VP: treat specific check result as natural 20

assessment.name: Assessment
assessment.note: Free action Insight check to learn opponent attack/defense bonuses relative to yours

benefit.name: Benefit
benefit.note: Significant social/legal benefit (Wealth 1-5, Status, Diplomatic Immunity, etc.)

eidetic_memory.name: Eidetic Memory
eidetic_memory.note: Perfect recall; +5 to remember things; +5 vs memory alteration

equipment.name: Equipment
equipment.note: 5 equipment points per rank for gear, vehicles, headquarters

extraordinary_effort.name: Extraordinary Effort
extraordinary_effort.note: Gain two benefits from extra effort; exhausted instead of fatigued

great_endurance.name: Great Endurance
great_endurance.note: +5 on fatigue, suffocation, starvation, environmental damage checks

instant_up.name: Instant Up
instant_up.note: Stand from prone as free action

interpose.name: Interpose
interpose.note: Reaction: take an attack meant for an ally within movement range

minion.name: Minion
minion.note: Follower with 15 x rank character points

second_chance.name: Second Chance
second_chance.note: Reroll one failed check vs specific hazard (once per hazard type)

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.note: Partner NPC with 5 x rank character points

teamwork.name: Teamwork
teamwork.note: +5 circumstance bonus to team checks, Aid action, and team attacks

trance.name: Trance
trance.note: Deep trance: add Awareness to Stamina for breath-holding; suspend disease/poison

agile_feint.name: Agile Feint
agile_feint.note: Use Acrobatics or movement rank instead of Deception to feint

animal_empathy.name: Animal Empathy
animal_empathy.note: Use interaction skills on animals normally

artificer.name: Artificer
artificer.note: Use Expertise: Magic to create temporary magical devices

connected.name: Connected
connected.note: Call in favors via Persuasion check (DC 10-25+)

contacts.name: Contacts
contacts.note: Gather information in 1 minute via Investigation check

daze.name: Daze
daze.note: Standard action: daze opponent with Deception or Intimidation (choose per rank)

fascinate.name: Fascinate
fascinate.note: Use interaction skill to entrance targets; standard action, maintained each round

favored_foe.name: Favored Foe
favored_foe.note: +2 circumstance bonus to Deception, Intimidation, Insight, Perception vs chosen type

hide_in_plain_sight.name: Hide in Plain Sight
hide_in_plain_sight.note: Hide while observed without diversion; requires cover/concealment

improvised_tools.name: Improvised Tools
improvised_tools.note: Ignore penalty for lacking proper tools

inventor.name: Inventor
inventor.note: Use Technology to create temporary inventions

jack_of_all_trades.name: Jack-of-all-trades
jack_of_all_trades.note: Use any skill untrained, even those normally requiring training

languages.name: Languages
languages.note: Rank 1: 1 language. Rank 2: 2. Rank 3: 4. Rank 4: 8. Doubles each rank. Rank 7: 64

ritualist.name: Ritualist
ritualist.note: Use Expertise: Magic to create and cast magical rituals

skill_mastery.name: Skill Mastery
skill_mastery.note: Make routine checks with chosen skill even under pressure

startle.name: Startle
startle.note: Use Intimidation instead of Deception to feint

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.note: Use Deception instead of Intimidation to demoralize

tracking.name: Tracking
tracking.note: Use Perception to visually follow tracks

well_informed.name: Well-informed
well_informed.note: Immediate Investigation or Persuasion check to recall info on first encounter
